Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Captain Vallenar]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 37''' — Nelthan refers to Varic Vallenar as Captain Vallenar.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 7''' — Captain Vallenar is the captain of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 35''' — Captain Vallenar is the captain of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Captain Vallenar is addressed by Starhammer.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 13''' — The narrator is addressed as Captain Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 30''' — Captain Vallenar is the Captain of The Last Horizon.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 3''' — Captain Vallenar is the leader of a crew and seeks to dismantle Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — The Vice Chief recognizes the narrator as Captain Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Captain Vallenar provides lessons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 7''' — The character is addressed as Captain Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 7''' — Captain Vallenar appears to Melerius as though seven people are crammed into one skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — Captain Vallenar is the captain of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 16''' — The Captain's name is Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 22''' — Captain Vallenar may be unwilling to cooperate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Captain Vallenar is addressed by Zykaros.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
